dict.string: KeepingYouAwake reads the joined Wi-Fi network's SSID so it can keep your Mac awake automatically while you are connected to networks you have chosen. macOS requires Location authorization to expose the SSID; no location data is recorded or transmitted.

KeepingYouAwake reads the joined Wi-Fi network's SSID so it can keep your Mac awake automatically while you are connected to networks you have chosen. macOS requires Location authorization to expose the SSID; no location data is recorded or transmitted.
